svg.title: Project file structure
svg.desc: Full directory tree for the compiler project with frontend, backend, compiler core, and tests

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the project root? requirements.txt, README, etc.')
sendPrompt('Walk me through coding lexer.py from scratch')
sendPrompt('Walk me through coding parser.py and building the AST')
sendPrompt('What AST node classes do we need in ast_nodes.py?')
sendPrompt('What should go in errors.py for the compiler?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Flask for this compiler backend?')
sendPrompt('Write the Flask app.py with /compile and /tokenize routes')
sendPrompt('What Python packages do we need in requirements.txt?')
sendPrompt('What should the compiler frontend look like? Describe the UI layout.')
sendPrompt('Build the index.html for the compiler web UI')
sendPrompt('Write the main.js that calls the Flask API and renders results')
sendPrompt('What test cases should we write for the compiler?')
sendPrompt('Write test cases for the lexer')
sendPrompt('Write test cases for the parser')
sendPrompt('Write test cases for the semantic analyzer')
sendPrompt('Write sample .lang source files to use as test inputs')
sendPrompt('How should we run tests for this project?')
